[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000100 1
1 1111111 a
2 1101001 4
3 1110100 4
4 0111011 5
5 0011101 4
6 0000000 a
7 0001110 3

01 10 0110000 2
12 21 0011001 3
23 32 0000000 a match 6
34 43 0000000 a match 6
45 54 0000100 1 match 0
56 65 1100100 3
67 76 1101001 4 match 2
70 07 1100000 2

02 20 0010100 2
13 31 0000000 a match 6
24 42 0001100 2
35 53 0000000 a match 6
46 64 0001110 3 match 7
57 75 1100000 2
60 06 1110100 4 match 3
71 17 0101001 3

03 30 0000000 a match 6
14 41 0001010 2
25 52 0000100 1 match 0
36 63 0000000 a match 6
47 74 0001000 1
50 05 1100100 3
61 16 0111011 5 match 4
72 27 0001001 2

04 40 0000100 1 match 0
15 51 0100000 1
26 62 0011101 4 match 5
37 73 0000000 a match 6
